# Clever Dog Method Blog

> Expert dog training tips, behavior guides, and brain training techniques.

## Recent Articles

### How to Stop Your Dog Barking at Night (5 Proven Methods)
URL: https://cleverdogmethod.com/blog/how-to-stop-dog-barking-at-night.html
Summary: Learn why dogs bark at night and 5 proven methods to stop it. Covers the pre-bedtime brain drain technique, ignore protocol, environmental management, bedtime routines, and brain training solutions.
Key Points:
- 80% of nighttime barking is caused by under-stimulation during the day
- Mental exercise is more tiring than physical exercise
- The "extinction burst" - barking gets worse before better when ignoring
- A 20-minute brain training session equals an hour-long walk in tiredness

### 5 Signs Your Dog is Bored (And What to Do About It)
URL: https://cleverdogmethod.com/blog/5-signs-your-dog-is-bored.html
Summary: Boredom is the #1 cause of behavior problems. Learn to spot the signs: destructive chewing, excessive barking, hyperactivity, attention seeking, and digging/escaping.

### Why Your Dog Chews Everything (The Real Reason)
URL: https://cleverdogmethod.com/blog/why-dogs-chew-everything.html
Summary: Destructive chewing isn't spite. It's usually boredom, anxiety, or teething. Learn how to redirect this natural behavior.

### 7 Brain Games That Tire Your Dog in 10 Minutes
URL: https://cleverdogmethod.com/blog/brain-games-that-tire-your-dog.html
Summary: Quick mental exercises that exhaust your dog faster than long walks. Includes hide and seek, puzzle feeders, and the shell game.

### The #1 Mistake Dog Owners Make (And How to Fix It)
URL: https://cleverdogmethod.com/blog/biggest-dog-training-mistake.html
Summary: Inconsistency ruins training progress. Learn how to maintain consistency across all family members and situations.

### Your Puppy's First Week Home: Complete Survival Guide
URL: https://cleverdogmethod.com/blog/puppy-first-week-home.html
Summary: Day-by-day guide for the critical first week. Covers crate training, potty training, sleep schedules, and socialization basics.

## Categories

- Behavior: Barking, chewing, jumping, aggression solutions
- Training Tips: Techniques and methods for all skill levels  
- Puppies: Specific guidance for young dogs 8 weeks+
- Health: Wellness tips and when to see a vet
